div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 250px; height: 1px; padding-top: 457px; margin-left: 10px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font:
JSON ログ例 (staging/prod):
{
"level": "info",
"msg": "request completed",
"trace_id": "abc123...",
"span_id": "def456...",
"method": "POST",
"path": "/api/v1/tasks",
"status": 200,
"duration_ms": 42
}

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 249, 230), rgb(28, 23, 7)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 250px; height: 1px; padding-top: 457px; margin-left: 290px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font:
text ログ例 (dev):
2024-01-15 10:30:42 INFO
request completed
trace_id=abc123...
method=POST
path=/api/v1/tasks
status=200
duration=42ms

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 244, 250), rgb(24, 28, 33)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 290px; height: 1px; padding-top: 457px; margin-left: 590px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font:
必須フィールド:
* level -- ログレベル (debug/info/warn/error)
* msg -- メッセージ本文
* trace_id -- 分散トレース ID (W3C Trace Context)
* span_id -- スパン ID
* service -- サービス名
* tenant_id -- テナント識別子 (マルチテナント)
* timestamp -- RFC3339 タイムスタンプ

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 250px; height: 1px; padding-top: 457px; margin-left: 910px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font:
環境による切替ロジック:
APP_ENV=dev → text format, stdout 直出力
APP_ENV=staging → JSON, Promtail → Loki
APP_ENV=prod → JSON, Promtail → Loki
設定: config-server が環境判定し
ログフォーマットを注入

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
